# KingshotPro — AI Pricing Raw Research Data
*April 10, 2026. Session 2 (Opus). 9x3x3 protocol + kingdom economics research.*
*This file is the raw research. AI_PRICING_FINDINGS.md is the recommendation doc.*
*Do NOT edit this file — it's the audit trail.*

---

## Verified Data Points

### Game Size
- Kingshot DAU: ~1.3 million (source: activeplayer.io via Perplexity)
- Kingshot MAU: ~7.1 million (same source)
- DAU/MAU ratio: 18%

### Kingdom Population (Reddit r/KingShot player reports)
- Top 5 alliances: 90-100 actives each = 450-500 serious players
- Total active per kingdom: 500-700
- After top 10 alliances: sharp dropoff
- 30-day server: top alliances ~90 actives each

### Tool Adoption Rates (DeepSeek industry analysis)
- 20-35% of active players visit third-party tools at least once
- 5-15% of visitors become regular weekly+ users
- 0.5-2% of active free users convert to paid tools
- kingshot.net 670K visits/mo ≈ 150K-250K unique visitors
- Against 7.1M MAU = 2-3.5% of playerbase uses top tool site

### Gaming Tool Pricing Benchmarks
- OP.GG Premium: $3.99/month, $39.99/year (verified — primarily ad removal)
- Mobalytics Pro: ~$9.99/month (estimated from OpenRouter/Claude)
- Blitz.gg Premium: ~$7.99/month (estimated)
- Skill Capped: $14.99/month (coaching content)
- No mobile strategy game premium tools found by ANY source

### AI API Costs (Anthropic, verified April 2026)
- Claude 3.5 Haiku: $0.25 input / $1.25 output per million tokens
- Claude Haiku 4.5: $1.00 / $5.00 per MTok
- Claude 3.5 Sonnet: $3.00 / $15.00 per MTok
- Batch API: 50% discount on all models

### Per-Message Cost (4550 input tokens, 300 output tokens)
- Haiku 3.5: $0.001512/message
- Sonnet 3.5: $0.018150/message

### Ad Revenue
- US rewarded video eCPM: $10-20 (ChatGPT estimate)
- Brazil/Turkey: $3-6
- Indonesia/Vietnam: $2-5
- Germany: $8-15
- Display ad eCPM (gaming niche): $2-6
- Daily free user revenue (3-5 pages): $0.01-0.05

### Conversion Rates
- Free-to-paid gaming tools: 1-5% (DeepSeek, industry benchmark)
- "Solid" conversion: ~2%
- Credit systems convert 2-5x more leads than hard paywalls

### Regional Pricing
- $4.99 USD in Indonesia/Vietnam ≈ 1-2 hours wages (too expensive)
- Regional pricing standard: Steam, Netflix, Spotify all do it
- Payment methods: GoPay/OVO/DANA (Indonesia), MoMo/ZaloPay (Vietnam), PIX (Brazil)

## Stress Test Results

### 12-hour non-stop user (720 messages)
- Free user (5 credits only): Cost $0.0076, Ad revenue $0.024 = PROFIT
- Free user (hypothetical unlimited): Cost $1.089, Ad revenue $0.024 = CATASTROPHIC LOSS
- Pro user (all Haiku): Cost $1.089/day = $32.67/month vs $3.99 revenue = LOSS $28.68
- Pro user (realistic 20 msgs/day): Cost $0.08/day = $2.40/month = PROFIT $1.59

### Break-even per Pro user
- Haiku: 88 messages/day every day for a month = $3.99 cost
- This is 1 message every 16 minutes for 24 hours, every day

## Kingdom Economics ($25/month target)

### Per-kingdom capture modeling
- 600 active players × 3% tool adoption × 10% regular = 1.8 regulars
- Our capture vs kingshot.net (15%): 0.3 users per kingdom
- AI differentiation could increase this significantly (unverified)

### Price needed for $25/month profit
| Users captured | Paid users | Price needed each |
|---------------|------------|-------------------|
| 3 | 1 | $26.00 |
| 5 | 2 | $13.50 |
| 10 | 3 | $9.33 |
| 15 | 5 | $6.00 |

## Herd Lens: CONDITIONAL PASS
- Source diversity: PASS (7/9 AI systems)
- Internal consistency: PASS
- Counter-evidence: PASS
- Fabrication risk: MILD FLAG (ChatGPT eCPMs are estimates)
- Manufactured consensus: LOW
- Missing voices: FLAG (no player surveys, 2 API failures)
- Contradictions: MINOR (ad margins tight in low-eCPM markets)
